message.content:
@startuml
title POJO's Class Diagram

skinparam backgroundColor white
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam class {
  BackgroundColor #F7F7F7
  BorderColor #777777
  HeaderBackgroundColor #EDEDED
}

package "POJO" as POJO {
  class Employee {
    id : int
    name : String
    surname : String
    bday : String
    nationality : String
    dataSign : String
    dataEnd : String
    salary : int
    phone : int
    post : String
    --
    Employee()
    Employee()
    getId()
    getName()
    getSurname()
    getBday()
    getNationality()
    getDataSign()
    getDataEnd()
    getSalary()
    getPhone()
    getPost()
    getSTName()
    getSTSurname()
    getSTBday()
    getSTDataSign()
    getSTDataEnd()
    getSTSalary()
    getSTPost()
    getSTNationality()
  }

  class Game {
    id : int
    opponent : String
    competition : String
    data : String
    score : int
    scoreOpponent : int
    home : int
    --
    Game()
    Game()
    getId()
    getOpponent()
    getCompetition()
    getData()
    getScore()
    getScoreOpponent()
    getHome()
    getSTOpponent()
    getSTCompetition()
    getSTdata()
    getSTscore()
    getSTscoreOpponent()
    getSThome()
  }

  class GameStat {
    id : int
    name : String
    surname : String
    start : int
    substitutes : int
    goal : int
    assist : int
    opponent : String
    --
    getId()
    getName()
    getSurname()
    getStart()
    getSubstitutes()
    getGoal()
    getAssist()
    getOpponent()
    GameStat()
    getSTname()
    getSTsurname()
    getSTopponent()
    getSTassist()
    getSTgoal()
    getSTstart()
    getSTsubstitutes()
  }

  class Player {
    id : int
    name : String
    surname : String
    bday : String
    nationality : String
    dataSign : String
    dataEnd : String
    salary : int
    phone : int
    price : int
    --
    getId()
    getName()
    getSurname()
    getBday()
    getNationality()
    getDataSign()
    getDataEnd()
    getSalary()
    getPrice()
    getSTName()
    getSTSurname()
    getSTBday()
    getSTDataSign()
    getSTDataEnd()
    getSTSalary()
    getSTPrice()
    getSTNationality()
    Player()
    getPhone()
    Player()
  }

  class MyAlert {
    ShowAlertError()
    ShowAlertInfo()
  }

  class User {
    Login : String
    Grand : String
    --
    User()
    getLogin()
    getSTLogin()
    getSTGrand()
  }
}

' Layout hints to resemble the original
Employee -[hidden]- Game
Game -[hidden]- GameStat
MyAlert -[hidden]- Player
Player -[hidden]- User
Employee -[hidden]down- Player
Game -[hidden]down- Player
GameStat -[hidden]down- User

@enduml
